_README: Held-out expectations for the eval harness. The grader drops in a file shaped like this. Each submission resolves to data/submissions/<name> (employee_info.json + receipts/). 'default_verdict' applies to every receipt not listed in 'line_items'. Citations are 'DOC-ID §SECTION'. Run: python -m scripts.evaluate ../eval/expected_sample.json

04_dinner_alinea.pdf.note: Solo diner $148 dinner vs $75 standard cap (not client entertainment)

05_dinner_franklin.pdf.note: Alcohol ($26) not reimbursable on solo travel; food reimbursable

02_hyatt_seattle.pdf.note: Seattle is Tier 1 ($350/nt); $457/nt x2 over cap, reimbursable $700

qa.question: Can I expense alcohol when I'm traveling alone on business?
What is the per-person dinner cap for business travel?
What is the nightly hotel cap for a Tier 1 city?
How many vacation days do new employees accrue?
What is the company's parental leave policy?
